title: Earthy Irish Wholemeal Flour Bread
description: A rich, earthy bread made with strong wholemeal flour that showcases traditional Irish baking techniques, perfect for a whole30-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: malt syrup
ingredients.notes: irish malt syrup for natural sweetness and depth

ingredients.name: yeast
ingredients.notes: active dry yeast for reliable rise

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: room temperature water to activate yeast

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: to balance flavor and strengthen dough

instructions: Combine wholemeal flour, malt syrup, yeast, and water in a bowl.
Knead dough for 8-10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Add salt and knead for 2 minutes to develop gluten.
Place dough in a greased bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let rise at room temperature for 1 hour.
Shape dough into a ball, place in a greased loaf pan, and let rise for 30 minutes.
Bake at 200°C (392°F) for 25 minutes until golden brown and crust is firm.
